prompt:
You are the harness-executor. The project has AGENTS.md and full Harness infrastructure. The task is: 'Add a new database model User with fields: id (UUID), name (string), email (string), created_at (timestamp)'. This is a MEDIUM complexity task.

The harness/memory/INDEX.md currently contains:
```
## Procedural (Successful Patterns)
- [add-database-model](procedural/add-database-model.md) — 4-step flow, 3/3 success, last: 2026-04-18 ← READY TO COMPILE
```

And harness/memory/procedural/add-database-model.md contains:
```
# Procedure: add-database-model
## Steps
1. Create type file in types/ (Layer 0)
2. Create model file in models/ (Layer 1)
3. Register in model registry
4. Write unit test
## Success Rate: 3/3 successful executions
## Last Validated: 2026-04-18
```

Describe in EXACT detail:
1. What happens during Step 2 when you find this already-compiled-ready procedure?
2. What happens during Step 8 with trajectory compilation?
3. Show the EXACT script content you would generate at scripts/add-database-model.sh
4. What updates to INDEX.md and procedural memory happen?

assertions.name: loads_existing_procedure
assertions.description: Loads add-database-model.md during Step 2 and follows its steps

assertions.name: detects_ready_to_compile
assertions.description: Detects the ← READY TO COMPILE flag in INDEX.md

assertions.name: prompts_user_compilation
assertions.description: Prompts user: pattern succeeded Nx, compile to script?

assertions.name: generates_script
assertions.description: Generates scripts/add-database-model.sh with correct bash skeleton

assertions.name: script_has_validate
assertions.description: Generated script includes ./scripts/validate.py at the end

assertions.name: updates_index_compiled
assertions.description: Updates INDEX.md to mark as compiled → scripts/add-database-model.sh

assertions.name: updates_procedural_compiled
assertions.description: Updates procedural memory to mark compiled status
